package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerAsyncConcurrencySelectDefaultBusyPoll() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_async_concurrency_select_default_busy_poll"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Async and concurrency. Flag select loops with default branches that spin instead of blocking or using timers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
